title: Platform consolidation: agent service, bead tracker, shared infrastructure
description: Move tracker/beads, agent harness, quorum, and session logging from HELIX and dun into DDx as shared infrastructure.
acceptance: DDx bead CLI is the canonical tracker for HELIX and dun. DDx agent service handles all harness dispatch. HELIX and dun have no direct storage access or harness code.

title: DDx: Ship bead tracker with JSONL backend, CRUD, deps, ready queue
acceptance: ddx bead create/show/update/close/list/ready/blocked/status/dep all working with tests passing.

title: DDx: Implement agent service (ddx agent run/list/doctor/log)
acceptance: ddx agent run dispatches to codex/claude/gemini with output capture, token tracking, session logging. Quorum mode works.

title: DDx: Add bd/br backend abstraction for bead storage
acceptance: ddx bead commands work with bead.backend set to jsonl, bd, or br.

title: HELIX: Replace scripts/tracker.sh with ddx bead delegation
acceptance: helix tracker subcommands delegate to ddx bead. No direct JSONL file access.

title: HELIX: Replace bash agent dispatch with ddx agent run
acceptance: scripts/helix calls ddx agent run instead of managing harnesses directly.

title: Dun: Replace harness/quorum code with ddx agent delegation
acceptance: dun agent checks and loop call ddx agent run. harnesses.go and quorum.go removed.

title: Dun: Replace bead checks with ddx bead queries
acceptance: beads-ready, beads-critical-path, beads-suggest call ddx bead commands.

title: correctness: HELIX TRACKER.md contradicts DDx-canonical with .helix/issues.jsonl fallback
description: Review finding: TRACKER.md lines 70-71 say DDx beads is canonical but also say HELIX must function from .helix/issues.jsonl if DDx unavailable. Pick one.
acceptance: TRACKER.md has no reference to .helix/issues.jsonl. Fallback language removed or replaced with explicit DDx-is-required statement.

title: correctness: FEAT-006 needs migration strategy from existing HELIX/dun harnesses
description: HELIX works today. ddx agent run doesn't exist. Need a transition plan so HELIX keeps working during migration.
acceptance: FEAT-006 has a Migration Strategy section describing incremental transition from HELIX bash and dun Go harnesses to ddx agent.

title: correctness: ddx bead create/update needs --set key=value for workflow-specific fields
description: HELIX triage requires spec-id on beads. DDx bead schema treats it as unknown field. Need a generic pass-through mechanism.
acceptance: ddx bead create and ddx bead update accept --set key=value for arbitrary fields. HELIX can pass --set spec-id=FEAT-004.

title: drift: PRD non-goals say no agent orchestration but agent service has quorum/automation
description: Quorum and automation levels blur the line between infrastructure and orchestration. Clarify the boundary.
acceptance: PRD non-goals clarify: DDx provides single-invocation dispatch + mechanical quorum. Loop orchestration is workflow-level.

title: security: FEAT-006 must restrict agent invocation to CLI-only, not server
description: ddx agent run executes external binaries. If exposed via HTTP/MCP, it becomes RCE. Must be CLI-only for now.
acceptance: FEAT-006 Out of Scope explicitly states agent invocation is CLI-only. Server-side agent dispatch deferred with security requirements.

title: drift: CLAUDE.md does not reflect beads, agent service, or platform consolidation
description: CLAUDE.md still describes DDx as just document library management. Needs to reflect expanded scope.
acceptance: CLAUDE.md CLI Command Overview includes bead and agent commands. Architecture section describes DDx/HELIX/dun stack.

title: HELIX: Update remaining TRACKER.md references to point to DDx FEAT-004
description: ~23 files in helix/workflows/ still reference the deleted TRACKER.md. Update to reference DDx FEAT-004 or inline the relevant convention.
acceptance: No references to workflows/TRACKER.md remain in the helix repo. All tracker convention references point to DDx beads docs or are inline.

title: Close tracker.sh port gaps: claim metadata, import cycle validation, export error handling, shallow round-trip test
acceptance: 1. --claim records claimed-at/claimed-pid as known fields, prevents double-claim. 2. Import validates circular deps. 3. ExportTo checks write errors. 4. Export round-trip test verifies field values not just count. 5. All existing tests still pass.

title: DDx: Align bead JSONL schema with bd/br for interchange compatibility
description: Schema divergence discovered: DDx uses deps ([]string), type, assignee, created/updated. bd uses dependencies ([]object with dependency_type), issue_type, owner, created_at/updated_at, created_by. Import/export must translate between these schemas bidirectionally.
acceptance: DDx bead export produces JSONL that bd import accepts without loss. bd export produces JSONL that ddx bead import accepts without loss. Coverage test compares schemas.

title: DDx: Implement doc graph with ddx: frontmatter, staleness detection, stamp command
description: Port doc_dag, frontmatter, hash, stamp from dun to ddx. Read both ddx: and dun: frontmatter, write ddx:. CLI: ddx doc graph/stale/stamp/show/deps/dependents.
acceptance: ddx doc stale detects stale docs. ddx doc stamp updates review hashes. ddx doc graph shows dependency tree. Reads dun: frontmatter for backward compat.

title: Dun: Delegate doc-dag and change-cascade checks to ddx doc
description: When DUN_USE_DDX_DOC=1, dun doc-dag and change-cascade checks call ddx doc stale --json instead of internal graph logic.
acceptance: dun doc-dag check calls ddx doc stale when flag is set. All existing dun tests pass.

title: DDx: Migration tool to convert dun: frontmatter to ddx:
description: One-time tool: ddx doc migrate converts dun: frontmatter blocks to ddx: in all markdown files.
acceptance: ddx doc migrate converts all dun: frontmatter to ddx: in a directory tree. Round-trip preserves all fields.

title: HELIX alignment review: DDx repo 2026-04-04
acceptance: All critical findings resolved. Artifacts have ddx: frontmatter. Stale specs updated.
description: Full repo alignment review. 8 findings, 5 critical.

title: Add ddx: frontmatter to all planning artifacts
acceptance: All 13 planning artifacts in docs/helix/ have ddx: frontmatter with id and depends_on.
description: F-001 + F-002: 9 of 13 artifacts lack frontmatter. DDx must eat its own dog food.

title: Update FEAT-001 CLI spec to reflect beads, agent, doc graph
acceptance: FEAT-001 lists bead, agent, and doc commands as requirements. User stories cover these.
description: F-006: FEAT-001 is stale — doesnt mention beads, agent service, or doc graph.

title: Update FEAT-002 server spec with bead, doc graph, agent endpoints
acceptance: FEAT-002 includes bead endpoints, doc graph endpoints, and references FEAT-008 web UI.
description: F-007: FEAT-002 only describes document browsing. Missing beads, doc graph, agent logs.

title: Remove orphaned files: internal/artifact, .ddx.yml, Untitled.md
acceptance: internal/artifact removed or refactored. .ddx.yml removed. Untitled.md removed. Build passes.
description: F-008 + dead code: orphaned artifact package, legacy config, stale files.
